ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizing_charts" (
  "sizing_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing chart */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Style ID */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Team ID */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size (e.g., S, M, L, XL) */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement */,
  "chest_circumference" REAL /* Chest circumference measurement */,
  "back_length" REAL /* Back length measurement */,
  "hip_circumference" REAL /* Hip circumference measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sizing chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the sizing chart */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the sizing chart is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sizing_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_charts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_charts_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Style name (e.g., authentic, premier) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Style description */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the style was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the style */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the style is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Team name (e.g., New York Giants, Boston Red Sox) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League (e.g., NFL, MLB, NBA) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the team */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the team is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Style ID */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Team ID */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size (e.g., S, M, L, XL) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity in stock */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Warehouse ID where the inventory is stored */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the inventory level */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the inventory item is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Customer ID */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Order date */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Order status (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, unpaid, refunded) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Order ID */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Inventory ID */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the item */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the item (quantity * unit_price) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Warehouse name */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the warehouse was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the warehouse */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the warehouse is active */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Order ID */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Warehouse ID */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Shipment date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Shipment status (e.g., in transit, delivered) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the shipment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Customer name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the customer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the customer is active */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
